steps.title: Find the pronoun role
steps.content: The blank modifies narrative, so it needs a possessive pronoun. The antecedent is poem, a singular noun.

steps.title: Use the possessive form
steps.content: Choice A is plural, so it does not agree with the singular antecedent. Choice B means they are, and Choice C means it is; neither is possessive. The singular possessive form correctly shows that the narrative belongs to the poem. The answer is D.
